title: cornopteris boryana
intro: Cornopteris boryana, a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, is a type of flowering plant that is commonly found in mountainous regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cornopteris boryana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Cornopteris boryana can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its extracts as a topical application to treat skin conditions.
